_publications._publicationTitle: Traditional and systems biology based drug discovery for the rare tumor syndrome neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: CUDC-907 at 25 mg/kg/day resulted in a trend of suppression of tumor growth compared with vehicle-treated controls after ten weeks with an average reduction of 55% in tumor size after 14 weeks
details: Resulted in a trend of suppression of tumor growth with an average reduction of 55% in tumor size after 14 weeks of treatment in meningioma model
